name: Zone B
overview: A tight group of friends, fired with unquenchable energy and enthusiasm, has come together to help two friends shoot a music video in time to get to a big competition in East Helsinki. Minor setbacks are not going to faze them, but then come some major problems, threatening not only their jobs but their loyalty to each other.

trailers.title: TRAILERI: "Last station before zone B" 😎 | Zone B Areenassa 2.2.2022
